Forecast Hours: f00-f60 (every 1 hour)\n   - File Size: ~919-940 MB per file\n   - Example: `nam.t00z.conusnest.hiresf00.tm00.grib2`\n\n2. **alaskanest** (Alaska Nest - 6km, Grid 198)\n   - Files: `nam.tCCz.alaskanest.hiresfFF.tm00.grib2`\n   - Forecast Hours: f00-f60\n   - Example: `nam.t00z.alaskanest.hiresf00.tm00.grib2`\n\n3. **hawaiinest** (Hawaii Nest - 3km, Grid 196)\n   - Files: `nam.tCCz.hawaiinest.hiresfFF.tm00.grib2`\n   - Forecast Hours: f00-f60\n   - Example: `nam.t00z.hawaiinest.hiresf00.tm00.grib2`\n\n4. **priconest** (Puerto Rico Nest - 3km, Grid 194)\n   - Files: `nam.tCCz.priconest.hiresfFF.tm00.grib2`\n   - Forecast Hours: f00-f60\n   - Example: `nam.t00z.priconest.hiresf00.tm00.grib2`\n\n5. **firewxnest** (Fire Weather Nest - 1.33km CONUS / 1.5km Alaska)\n   - Files: `nam.tCCz.firewxnest.hiresfFF.tm00.grib2`\n   - Forecast Hours: f00-f36 (every 1 hour)\n   - File Size: ~79-109 MB per file\n   - Example: `nam.t00z.firewxnest.hiresf00.tm00.grib2`\n   - Note: On-call nest; placement determined daily\n\n### Other Categories\n\n6. **afwaca** (AFWA Central America/Caribbean - 12km)\n   - Files: `nam.tCCz.afwacaFF.tm00.grib2`\n   - Forecast Hours: 00, 03, 06, 09, 12, 15, 18, 21, 24, 27, 30, 33, 36, 39, 42, 45, 48, 51, 54, 57, 60, 63, 66, 69, 72, 75, 78, 81, 84\n   - Example: `nam.t00z.afwaca00.tm00.grib2`\n\n7. **satbiasc** (Satellite Bias Correction)\n   - Technical files for satellite data assimilation\n\n## File Naming Convention\n\n**Pattern:** `nam.tCCz.[category]fFF.tm00.grib2`\n\nWhere:\n- `nam` = North American Mesoscale model\n- `tCCz` = Model cycle runtime (CC = 00, 06, 12, 18)\n- `category` = File category (conusnest, firewxnest, etc.)\n- `fFF` = Forecast hour (00-60 for nests, 00-84 for CONUS)\n- `tm00` = Time indicator (always tm00)\n- `grib2` = GRIB2 format\n\n**Index Files:** Each .grib2 file has a corresponding .idx file for subsetting:\n- `nam.t00z.conusnest.hiresf00.tm00.grib2.idx`\n\n## File Sizes\n\n| Category | Typical Size | Notes |\n|----------|---------------|-------|\n| conusnest | 919-940 MB | CONUS 5km resolution |\n| firewxnest | 79-109 MB | Fire weather high-resolution |\n| MB (estimated) | Central America/Caribbean 12km |\n\n## Forecast Hours Available\n\n### CONUS, Alaska, Hawaii, Puerto Rico Nests\n- **Range:** f00 through f60\n- **Frequency:** Every 1 hour\n- Categories\n- **Range:** f00 through f84\n- **Frequency:** Every 3 hours (00, 03, 06, 09, etc.)\n- **Total:** 29 forecast times per model run\n\n## Index Files (.idx)\n\nEach GRIB2 file has a Download specific geographic areas\n- **Time subsetting:** Download specific forecast hours\n\n**Example usage with wgrib2:**\n```bash\n# Download specific variables using index file\ncurl -s
